## Checklist

- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] `bun run test` passes (includes the axe-core a11y gate — 0 serious/critical)
- [ ] No change to the `manifest.json` version (maintainers bump on release)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
